title: Eva Jetpacks
wikitext:
[]: Eva Jetpacks? Post by RandomStuff » Mon Mar 17, 2008 9:24 pm Watching episode 11 I noticed Rei uses some kind of jump jet/jetpack to cusion her fall. This anywhere else I missed? I wouldn't this be used more often?

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Mar 17, 2008 9:44 pm That's the only time we see that retro-rocket system. Neither Eva-00 nor any other Eva is seen using it again.

[]: Post by Furu » Mon Mar 17, 2008 9:49 pm Vernier jets! Used to help the Gundam remain stab-... ..oh, wait, no. Wrong show. Anyway, I assume all it's good for is slowing descents, which is probably why that's the only time it's used: Plot.

[]: Post by Shiro » Tue Mar 18, 2008 12:25 am Hm...in the Proposal, Zeruel was replaced by Arael, who was battled in the air. Flying Evas? Maybe that propulsion system survived the massive proposal culling in the form of that scene.

[]: Post by Zuggy » Tue Mar 18, 2008 10:05 am Rebuild spoilers wrote: In the preview for 2.0 Eva-2 and Eva-5 have jetpacks or rockets on their back. Eva-5 is seen using them by flying down a dark corridor, presumably to Terminal Dogma, while Eva-2 is launched out of a plane with a jetpack and set of wings. Link to stupid gif.

[]: Post by Furu » Tue Mar 18, 2008 10:40 am Zugzwang wrote: Rebuild spoilers wrote: Link to stupid gif.

[]: Post by Dr. Nick » Tue Mar 18, 2008 2:57 pm They've been toying with the idea.

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Mar 19, 2008 12:59 am Usually, many fans suggest that any Angel that is able to hover over ground etc are employing their A.T Field, to some degree. Evas should be able to do this, but it hasn't been shown in the series nor the movies.

[]: Post by Furu » Wed Mar 19, 2008 6:20 am The closest thing would be 01's wings of light in EoE and the F-Type's AT Field-boosted jumping in the various games it appears in.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Wed Mar 19, 2008 8:19 am Furu wrote: The closest thing would be 01's wings of light in EoE and the F-Type's AT Field-boosted jumping in the various games it appears in.

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Mar 19, 2008 9:14 am master_lloyd wrote: Is there anything the A.T field can't do?!

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Wed Mar 19, 2008 9:19 am CorporalChaos wrote: master_lloyd wrote: Is there anything the A.T field can't do?!

[]: Post by BobBQ » Wed Mar 19, 2008 2:53 pm master_lloyd wrote: Is there anything the A.T field can't do?!

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Wed Mar 19, 2008 3:29 pm BobBQ wrote: master_lloyd wrote: Is there anything the A.T field can't do?!

[]: Post by RandomStuff » Wed Mar 19, 2008 5:46 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Evas should be able to do this, but it hasn't been shown in the series nor the movies.

[]: Post by Sachi » Thu Mar 27, 2008 7:50 am Eva's don't need to fly. They wouldn't be able to fly that far anyways, it's clear in Ep 16 (Leliel), that the umbilical cable only goes so far. So where the heck would the fly? And what's worse is that if they flew without their umbilical cable, because when they run out of power, they could drop anywhere, over the ocean and be lost to the bottom, in a volcano. Flying is an unnecessary ability for the Eva's. Only useful to affect their momentum on the way down (just like when Rei used it). But, when you think about it, she didn't even need it because they've had the Eva's drop for way higher than what she did before (Ep 09).

[]: Post by RandomStuff » Sat Mar 29, 2008 10:23 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Flying is an unnecessary ability for the Eva's. Only useful to affect their momentum on the way down (just like when Rei used it). But, when you think about it, she didn't even need it because they've had the Eva's drop for way higher than what she did before (Ep 09).

[]: Post by Sachi » Sat Mar 29, 2008 10:25 pm It was just added for stylistic effect.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sat Mar 29, 2008 11:48 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Evas should be able to do this, but it hasn't been shown in the series nor the movies.

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Mar 29, 2008 11:53 pm NAveryW wrote: BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Evas should be able to do this, but it hasn't been shown in the series nor the movies.
